implementation_summary: Replaced the generic S043 UxHubPage primary panel with a real decision-record workbench entry.
Added one selected decision object and one primary next action to the decision room.
Backed the UI with the EPIC-12 contract metadata while keeping internal proof/process identifiers out of visible UI copy.
Rendered input, gate/decision, output and blocker/failure pendants for the S043 decision-register step.

user_added_acceptance.all_process_steps_need_ui_pendant: S043 now exposes UI pendants for its owned step; remaining S044/S045/S046/S047/S051 step clusters stay in scope for EPIC-12-IMPL-01B and EPIC-12-IMPL-01C.
user_added_acceptance.missing_screens_should_be_introduced: No new route was required for S043; S051 remains identified as the audit-history pendant route and must receive first-class DOMAIN-I ownership proof in later subtasks.

validation.notes: Includes 1400x900 screenshot proof and visible-copy no-overclaim audit.

validation.command: PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3125 pnpm exec playwright test tests/route-smoke.spec.ts --grep "043 /decisions"
validation.notes: An earlier parallel route-smoke attempt was blocked by a Playwright dev-server port collision; rerun separately passed.

positive_acceptance: S043 route renders a contract-backed decision-register entry.
Exactly one primary next action opens the decision room.
Redundant rationale/evidence/audit-history context cards were removed from S043; their owned work surfaces remain downstream.
Visible UI includes decision input, selected output state, rationale/evidence/audit context and blocker state.
negative_acceptance: Visible UI does not expose EPIC/BP ids, process-first/proof language, route ids, page ids, data-testid labels or internal proof wording.
S043 does not claim client acceptance, export readiness, evidence sufficiency or client release.
S043 remains a record-selection entry; decision mutation and release checks stay downstream.

next_ticket.recommendation: Proceed into the core queue/detail/step surfaces and close the remaining UI-pendant gaps for S044, S045, S046, S047 and S051 instead of stretching the S043 entry into a fake all-domain proof surface.
